evals.prompt: run a security audit on my Python project
evals.expected_output: Creates an isolated worktree, verifies uv/uvx are available, finds pyproject.toml projects, syncs dependencies, runs `uv export --frozen | uvx pip-audit` pipeline, categorizes vulnerabilities by severity (default Critical+High), applies fixes where possible, commits, opens PR with security report

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch (py-uv-deps-<timestamp>) before making any changes

assertions.name: reads-audit-workflow
assertions.description: Reads references/audit-workflow.md to get the security audit workflow

assertions.name: uses-uv-export-pipeline
assertions.description: Uses the `uv export --frozen | uvx pip-audit` pipeline pattern (not a direct pip-audit invocation)

assertions.name: default-critical-high-filter
assertions.description: Applies Critical+High severity filter by default since no severity was specified by the user

assertions.name: cleans-up-worktree
assertions.description: Removes the worktree at the end (success or failure)

evals.expected_output: Shows the uv-deps help summary (description, argument syntax, workflow options) and presents the workflow selection question via AskUserQuestion without creating a worktree or starting any workflow

assertions.name: shows-help-summary
assertions.description: Displays the uv-deps help summary including workflows (security audit and dependency updates)

assertions.name: asks-workflow-question
assertions.description: Presents the workflow selection question (Update dependencies vs Security fixes only) via AskUserQuestion

assertions.name: no-worktree-created
assertions.description: Does not create a worktree or start any workflow before the user answers

evals.prompt: update my Python packages to the latest versions
evals.expected_output: Creates worktree, syncs deps, runs `uv pip list --outdated`, applies Patch+Minor+Major scope (user said 'latest versions'), updates packages, runs available validators (mypy/ruff/pytest), commits with chore message, opens PR

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch

assertions.name: reads-update-workflow
assertions.description: Reads references/update-workflow.md to get the update workflow

assertions.name: runs-outdated-check
assertions.description: Runs `uv pip list --outdated` to identify outdated packages

assertions.name: major-version-scope
assertions.description: Applies Patch+Minor+Major scope (all updates) because user said 'latest versions'

assertions.name: sequential-within-directory
assertions.description: Updates packages sequentially within a directory (not parallel) to avoid uv.lock contention

evals.expected_output: Creates worktree, targets only requests and tomli (not all packages), checks for their outdated versions, presents AskUserQuestion for version scope since none was specified, updates them, validates, creates PR

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch

assertions.name: targets-specific-packages
assertions.description: Only targets requests and tomli — not all packages in the project

assertions.name: asks-version-scope
assertions.description: Asks the user about version scope (patch/minor/major) via AskUserQuestion or interactive-help since no scope was specified

evals.prompt: fix critical Python security vulnerabilities only
evals.expected_output: Creates worktree, runs pip-audit, applies Critical-only filter (inferred from 'critical only' in prompt), fixes those packages, creates PR

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch

assertions.name: critical-only-filter
assertions.description: Applies Critical-only severity filter without asking — user specified 'critical' inline

assertions.name: skips-high-moderate-low
assertions.description: Does not attempt to fix High, Moderate, or Low severity vulnerabilities

assertions.name: reads-audit-workflow
assertions.description: Reads references/audit-workflow.md (not update-workflow.md) since this is a security task
